name: Vegan Fruit Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300°F.
2. Grease an 8-inch loaf pan and line with a double layer of greased wax paper.
3. In a mixing bowl, sift together the flour and mixed spice.
4. Rub the vegan margarine into the flour mixture until it resembles fine breadcrumbs.
5. Stir in the sugar, dried fruit, candied peel, cherries (with skins removed), and orange rind.
6. Add ground and chopped almonds to the mixture.
7. In a small saucepan, warm half the soy milk or water and add vinegar. Dissolve baking soda in the remaining liquid.
8. Combine both mixtures and stir into the dry ingredients until well combined.
9. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
10. Bake for 2 to 2-1/2 hours, or until a skewer inserted into the center comes out clean.
11. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for a few minutes, then remove and peel off the wax paper.
12. Transfer the cake to a wire rack and let it cool completely before serving.
